opinion.h1: TOMICH v. UNION TRUST CO, 278 U.S. 664 (1929)
opinion.h2: T. TOMICH, Harry F. Scott, and H. Mulberger, appellants, v. UNION TRUST CO., Spokane & Eastern Trust Company. [Footnote 1]
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John A. Shelton, of Butte, Mont., for appellants.
Dismissed with costs pursuant to paragraph 2 of rule 13.

f.p: Transcript in this case was withdrawn from Supreme Court and filed in Circuit Court of Appeals. For opinion in that court, see 31 F.(2d) 515.[ Tomich v. Union Trust Co 278 U.S. 664 (1929) ]
